import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b_opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
    match b_opt
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        mut sign = 1
        if b == 45
          sign = -1
          i = i + 1
        else if b == 43
          i = i + 1
        end
        mut value = 0
        mut has_digit = false
        while i < n
          let d_opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
          match d_opt
          when Some(d)
            if d >= 48 and d <= 57
              value = value * 10 + (d - 48)
              has_digit = true
              i = i + 1
            else
              i = n + 1
            end
          when None
            i = n + 1
          end
          if i == n + 1
            i = i
          end
        end
        if has_digit
          let signed = value * sign
          if signed % 2 == 0
            sum = sum + signed
          end
        end
        i = i
        mut j = 0
        j = 0
        while i < n
          let w_opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
          match w_opt
          when Some(w)
            if w == 32 or w == 9 or w == 10 or w == 13
              i = i + 1
            else
              i = n + 2
            end
          when None
            i = n + 2
          end
        end
        if i >= n
          i = n
        end
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  println("sum_even=#{sum}")
end
